name: TomasHer/prompting-blueprints
description: Your guide to the Agentic AI evolution. **Prompting Blueprints** offers a curated collection of concepts and tactics for building autonomous AI workflows. Master tool-specific playbooks, backed by structured prompt packs and rigorous evaluations for the latest AI models.

name: dennysjmarquez/artisan-symbolic-dsl-LLMs
description: Artisan System DSL (Domain-Specific Language) A symbolic governance framework for LLMs. Implements deterministic control, Zero Trust security, and autonomous evolution through domain-specific language architecture.

name: dennysjmarquez-dev/artisan-symbolic-dsl-LLMs
description: Artisan System DSL (Domain-Specific Language) A symbolic governance framework for LLMs. Implements deterministic control,  Zero Trust security, and autonomous evolution through domain-specific  language architecture.

name: genejr2025/circe-framework
description: CIRCE: Collaborative Intelligent Response Circular Evolution — A framework for autonomous multi-agent AI coordination with persistent memory, file-based protocols, and human oversight.

name: YIING99/agent-evolution-protocol
description: A safe, transparent, and human-controlled self-evolution framework for AI agents. Three-zone safety architecture ensures AI learns autonomously while humans stay in control.
